name: Bodrum Round Upholstered Ottoman - Threshold™
description:
Make a stylish addition to your living room or den with the Bodrum Round Upholstered Ottoman from Threshold™. This fabric-upholstered round ottoman comes in a beautiful jewel tone that adds a touch of dimension to your space, and the straightforward cylindrical design contrasts perfectly with the rich color. Standing at a height of 18 inches, this mod-inspired ottoman makes a perfect footrest or coffee-table stand-in, and the wood frame and padded seat provide a stable, comfy seat for guests. Whether you pair it with your couch or your favorite accent chair, you'll love the style and functionality it adds to your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
